title: Midnight Run complete — 47 deals matched

title: Pre-foreclosure spike in Williamson Co.

title: Austin multifamily cap rates ticking up
body: Class B/C cap rates moved from 5.1% to 5.4% over 60 days per CoStar data.

title: TX SB 2 passes — property tax appraisal caps
body: Assessment growth limits expected to dampen value increases on income-producing properties statewide.

title: Absentee landlord concentration rising in 78741
body: Out-of-state owners now 34% of the SFR stock in this zip, up from 26% in Q1 2026.
